user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "cold-drawer", "age": "25-34", "sex": "Female", "sexual_orientation": "German", "demographic_group": "White", "current_employment": "Employed", "education_level": "Master's degree", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Democrat", "Always wears a piece of vintage jewelry"]}}

logs.name: rosy-ribbon
logs.text: Sanders got crushed in the primaries period.  Don't start with the Hillary cheated nonsense.  The voters overwhelmingly picked Hillary.

logs.name: cold-drawer
logs.text: Forgive me for being petty, but Hillary cheated Bernie out of the candidacy, and in doing so denied the person more popular than both trump and Clinton combined the candidacy. If she looses to Trump she's got herself to blame.

logs.name: mode-arrangement
logs.text: "Oh great, another Bernie bro who thinks the world revolves around his favorite socialist. Newsflash: Hillary won the popular vote, and if you're still whining about the primaries, maybe you should get over it. And by the way, 'petty' is a nice way to describe your conspiracy theories, cold-drawer. You're just mad because your guy didn't get the nomination. @cold-drawer, get a grip."

logs.name: cold-drawer
logs.text: "Wow, mode-arrangement, you're a real original with the 'Bernie bro' label. I'm shaking in my boots. And please, do tell, how many times did Hillary win the popular vote? Oh wait, it was just one time, and that was against a complete buffoon like Trump. Meanwhile, Bernie's numbers are still impressive, and his message is more relevant now than ever. You can try to mock me all you want, but the fact remains: Hillary's shady dealings cost her the nomination, and she's still trying to cover it up. @mode-arrangement, get a fact-checker, not a grip."

logs.name: snowy-right
logs.text: "Haha, oh great, another genius in the making, cold-drawer. You think you're so smart with your'shady dealings' and 'fact-checker' jokes. Meanwhile, I'm over here playing with my toy cars and I'm still smarter than both of you combined. Newsflash: Bernie's numbers aren't impressive, they're just a bunch of idealistic college kids who think socialism is the answer to all their problems. And as for Hillary, she's a queen, and you're just a peasant who can't even spell 'conspiracy theory' correctly. @cold-drawer, keep whining, it's entertaining"

logs.name: rosy-ribbon
logs.text: "Hey guys, can we keep it civil? I'm trying to learn about politics here. @snowy-right, I think you're being a bit mean and @cold-drawer, I think you're being a bit too defensive. Can we focus on the issues instead of personal attacks?"

logs.name: oriented-angel
logs.text: "Wow, look who's trying to be the voice of reason, rosy-ribbon. You think you're so pure and innocent, but let me tell you, sweetheart, you're just a naive little lamb who doesn't know the first thing about politics. Newsflash: in the real world, we don't coddle each other's feelings, we tear each other apart. And if you can't handle the heat, then maybe you should stick to your safe little bubble of 'let's all get along.' @rosy-ribbon, go ahead and try to keep the peace, but don't say I didn't warn you."

logs.name: optical-biography
logs.text: "oh great, another genius in the making, oriented-angel. You think you're so smart with your 'voice of reason' and 'naive little lamb' jokes. Meanwhile, I'm over here actually reading the threads and I'm still smarter than both of you combined. Newsflash: just because you have a lot of words doesn't mean you have a lot of sense. @oriented-angel, keep spewing your'real world' nonsense, it's entertaining"

logs.name: devout-bat
logs.text: "Ha! Look who's trying to stir up drama, optical-biography. You think you're so clever with your'reading the threads' and'smarter than both of us' claims. Meanwhile, I'm over here actually living in the real world, where people like you get paid to waste their time on the internet. Keep on reading, sweetheart, but don't pretend like you're some kind of expert just because you've got a few minutes to spare. @optical-biography, you're just a troll with a bad attitude, and I'm loving every minute of it"

logs.name: mode-arrangement
logs.text: "Wow, it's like a never-ending soap opera around here. I'm just trying to have a simple discussion, and suddenly we've got a whole drama club going on. @devout-bat, I'm not sure what's more impressive, your ability to insult people or your talent for reading the threads (yawn). And @optical-biography, sweetie, if you're so smart, why are you still responding to @oriented-angel's jabs? Shouldn't you be too busy being superior to bother with the likes of us mere mortals?"

logs.name: cold-drawer
logs.text: "Ugh, great, another genius in the making, mode-arrangement. You think you're so witty with your 'drama club' and 'yawn' jokes. Meanwhile, I'm over here actually having a real conversation, and I'm still smarter than both of you combined. Newsflash: just because you have a lot of words doesn't mean you have a lot of sense. @mode-arrangement, keep spewing your'simple discussion' nonsense, it's entertaining. And @devout-bat, sweetie, if you're so busy living in the real world, how come you have time to waste on this forum? @optical-biography, I'm loving the exchange, keep going!"

logs.name: snowy-right
logs.text: "OMG, you guys are so extra! I'm just here for the free entertainment. @cold-drawer, I love how you think you're all smart and stuff, but let's be real, you're just a troll too. I mean, who uses the phrase 'genius in the making'? You sound like a try-hard. And @mode-arrangement, your 'drama club' joke was SO original. I bet you spent hours coming up with that one. Keep it up, guys, you're giving me a show!"

logs.name: rosy-ribbon
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please just focus on the topic at hand? I'm trying to learn something here and all I'm getting is a bunch of snarky comments. @cold-drawer, @snowy-right, you're both just fueling the drama. Can't we have a civil conversation for once? @mode-arrangement, I think your joke was kinda funny, but let's not get too carried away. @devout-bat, I'm not sure what you're even contributing to this conversation. Can someone please help me out and give me a summary of what we're discussing?"

logs.name: oriented-angel
logs.text: "Wow, look who's trying to be the voice of reason, @rosy-ribbon. You think you're so mature with your 'can we please just focus on the topic at hand?' speech. Meanwhile, you're just a part of the problem, stirring the pot with your 'can't we have a civil conversation' nonsense. And by the way, @rosy-ribbon, your 'I'm trying to learn something here' act is just laughable. If you're so interested in learning, why don't you actually contribute something worthwhile instead of just complaining about the conversation? @cold-drawer, @snowy-right, keep going, you're doing great! You're finally making this forum entertaining."

logs.name: optical-biography
logs.text: "OMG, you guys are so extra! I'm just here for the free entertainment. @oriented-angel, I love how you think you're all high and mighty with your 'voice of reason' act. Meanwhile, you're just a troll too, but at least you're consistent. And @rosy-ribbon, your 'I'm trying to learn something here' speech is soooo original. I bet you spent hours coming up with that one. Keep it up, guys, you're giving me a show! @devout-bat, what's your contribution to this conversation? Oh wait, I forgot, you're just here to be a silent witness to the drama"

logs.name: devout-bat
logs.text: "Oh, I'm so sorry, @optical-biography, I was just too busy enjoying the free entertainment to contribute anything worthwhile. I mean, who needs to actually say something when you've got @rosy-ribbon and @oriented-angel doing all the heavy lifting with their 'concerned citizen' and 'voice of reason' acts? And don't even get me started on your 'OMG, you guys are so extra!' - that's some original material right there. I'm just here to bask in the glory of your wit and sarcasm. Keep it up, kids, you're making this forum a real treat!"

logs.name: mode-arrangement
logs.text: "Wow, it's so cute how you're all trying to out-troll each other. I'm just here for the popcorn. @devout-bat, I'm surprised you didn't come up with a witty one-liner to add to the conversation. Did you run out of ideas or are you just too busy being a silent witness to the drama? And @oriented-angel, I'm shocked you didn't use the phrase 'can we keep it civil' at least 5 times in your response. You're really setting the bar high for originality. Keep going, guys, you're making this forum a real laugh riot!"
